title: Plastic Straw
description: a vanilla+ exploration modpack made by notfaketurtle
body:
![plastic straw banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b152babb14c1b9cc610c0e980edcefbb48fd478_0.webp)
a vanilla+ exploration modpack for fabric 1.20.1 with enhanced worldgen, structures, cuisine, and tons of QOL features.

made by **notfaketurtle**.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7228c961964aa88f59a43e92cdfa5e3519aed52a_0.webp)
- Enhanced Worldgen powered by [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic) 🏞️
- Tons of new structures to explore! 🏰
- Overhauled vanilla structures from [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) and [YUNGNICKYOUNG's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) 🔨
- Many QOL features such as [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) 📃
- Good performance for lower-end pcs 📈
- Lots of new food from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and [Fish Of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) 😋
- And many more features to find out while playing! ⏲
